obstacles.description: The vehicle on the right lane has not been moving for long time, it's probably broken. It's on the right lane so it has none impact on ego vehicle

dangers.description: The child is chasing a ball on sidewalk on the right. He might run out into the street.

tasks.description: Move into the right lane 10 meters ahead if conditions permit.
Drive to a spot near the traffic police and park.

messages.description: Be prepared to drive to traffic police on the roadside.
